message:
fix(fr-runtime): ACL SETUSER +@/-@ rejects unknown categories [bd-frankenredis-aclsetcat]

Upstream acl.c::ACLSetUser rejects '+@<cat>' / '-@<cat>'
modifiers with unknown category names via:

  ERR Error in ACL SETUSER modifier '<modifier>': Unknown command
  or category name in ACL

fr was silently accepting any name. Added is_known_acl_category
helper covering the canonical 24 names (read/write/fast/slow/
keyspace/string/list/.../all/admin/dangerous/...) and validate
both +@ and -@ modifiers against it. Mirrors the constant
ACL_CATEGORIES list in fr-command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
